case_title: MISSION CAPP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. JONES, KETTY et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, KETTY

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PARTIES STIPULATE TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL. PRESENT: ATNY S.BERENSTEIN PRESENT FOR PLTF. SPEC APP BY ATNY ARNOLD ELLIS FOR DEFT. STIP THAT SCOPE OF DISCOVERY NOT TO GO BEYOND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES OF ANSWER. ONE DEPOSITION MAY BE TAKEN OF PROPERTY MANAGER OR APPROPRIATE PARTY TO RESPOND RE PROPERTY DAMAGE ISSUES AND ISSUES RAISED BY ANSWER. REPORTER: MARILYN NORMAN.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-07-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS RECORDED BY LESLIE GARBER. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, KETTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2155 MISSION STREET APT. #411 $694.52 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,734.52, STAYED UNTIL FEB-25-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DEFAULTS OR FAILS TO SATISFY JUDGMENT ENTIRELY BY 6/1/97, PLTF UPON EX-PARTE DECLARATION SHALL HAVE A WRIT ISSUED FOR IMMEDIATE EVICTION AND ENFORCEMENT OF THE MONITARY PORTION OF THIS JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
